turns.name: WILLIAM H. REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 88-995, Northbrook National Insurance Company against Brewer will be announced by Justice Marshall.

turns.name: THURGOOD MARSHALL
turns.text: In this case, the federal diversity statute provides that in a direct action against a liability insurer, the insurer shall be deemed a citizen of the same state as the insured for purposes of diversity jurisdiction. Today, we hold that this proviso does not apply to a Texas Workers' Compensation action brought in Federal Court by another state insurer. We, therefore, reverse the judgment of the Court of Appeals. Justice Stevens has filed a dissenting opinion.
